## 🚀 Feature Summary
A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like.

## 🎯 Problem it Solves
What problem or gap does this feature address?

## 💡 Proposed Solution
Describe how you envision this feature working.

## 🧠 Intelligence Module
Which module does this feature relate to?
- [ ] 🎯 Vision (SAHI, Re-ID, Super-Resolution)
- [ ] 🚁 Drone Swarm (Formation, Tracking)
- [ ] 🔊 Acoustic (Triangulation, Kinetic Events)
- [ ] 📡 SIGINT (RF Analysis, EW Detection)
- [ ] 🌐 3D Digital Twin (CesiumJS, Mapping)
- [ ] 👥 Crowd Intelligence (Density, Panic)
- [ ] 🛰️ Satellite (GeoAI, Change Detection)
- [ ] 🧬 Fusion Engine (Anomaly, Decision)
- [ ] 📄 NLP (Transcription, Reasoning)
- [ ] 🆕 New Module

## 📸 Mockups / References
If applicable, add diagrams, screenshots, or links to similar implementations.

## 📝 Additional Context
Add any other context about the feature here.
